topStories.title: Government complains about backlog, but feeds it too as the biggest litigant, says Supreme Court judge Nagarathna
topStories.description: ‘The state is expected to litigate with restraint and be a model litigator, but that does not happen. It goes on litigating until the end’

topStories.title: Trump threatens to deploy ICE to airports amid Homeland Security shutdown
topStories.description: The US president called on immigration agents to place 'heavy emphasis' on the arrests of Somali immigrants.

topStories.title: MAGA fans swoon over ‘Jessica Foster’ warship photos in Strait of Hormuz, but ‘US Army soldier’ never existed
topStories.description: Images believed to be created using artificial intelligence portrayed Foster as a US Army soldier leading an extraordinary, high-profile life aligned with the ‘America First’ agenda.

topStories.title: In UP's Kintur village, Eid was not observed this year. Reason: An ancestral link to war-hit Iran
topStories.description: The reason lies far beyond the village, in Iran, where the death of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei in airstrikes by the US and Israel has left a deep emotional impact

topStories.title: Bahrain says Patriot system intercepted drone over homes
topStories.description: Bahrain's account differs from how the US military described the March 9 incident, which led to civilian injuries.

topStories.title: Musk Offers To Pay US Airport Staff Worker's Salaries Amid Funding Standoff
topStories.description: Tech tycoon Elon Musk offered Saturday to pay security personnel at US airports during a political standoff over funding for the Department of Homeland Security (DHS).

topStories.title: PM Modi condemns attacks in West Asia, seeks open shipping lanes in call with Iran President
topStories.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi urges open shipping lanes, condemns attacks on energy infrastructure in talks with Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian

topStories.title: Congress to fight 100 seats in Assam assembly elections after forging alliance with five other parties
topStories.description: Congress on Friday released its fourth list of seven candidates, taking its total to 94 nominees for the 126-seat Assam Assembly elections.

topStories.title: 'BRICS must play independent role': Iran on what President Pezeshkian told PM Modi
topStories.description: Iran President Pezeshkian said the discussions with PM Narendra Modi covered bilateral ties as well as “regional and international developments”.

topStories.title: Iranian woman’s video of US-Israel attack ends as bomb hits
topStories.description: The fate of an Iranian woman caught in a US-Israeli bomb attack is unknown, after video emerged of her filming it.

topStories.title: Elon Musk offers to pay salaries of unpaid TSA staff due to partial government shutdown
topStories.description: Amid the partial US government shutdown, Elon Musk proposed covering TSA personnel salaries. Essential TSA workers are struggling without pay, leading to staff shortages and long wait times at airports. Reports indicate some employees are seeking extra jobs or assistance.

dailyNews.title: Unease in Japan after Trump cites Pearl Harbor to defend Iran war
dailyNews.description: US president's reference to Japan's 1941 attack has shaken Japanese as PM Takaichi's silence gets mixed reaction.

dailyNews.title: US Says Iran Threat To Strait of Hormuz "Degraded" After Strikes
dailyNews.description: US Says Iran Threat To Strait of Hormuz "Degraded" After Strikes

dailyNews.title: US & its allies' ‘attempts to silence voice’: Iranian-linked hacking group as its website back after FBI seized domains
dailyNews.description: Following a cyberattack on Stryker, the Iranian-linked Handala Hack Team's website went back online after the FBI seized its domains. The group claimed the seizures were attempts to suppress their voice, while Stryker is working to restore its systems and confirmed product safety.

dailyNews.title: Duggar couple arrested: What are the new charges against Joseph Duggar and Kendra Duggar?
dailyNews.description: Former reality star Joseph Duggar will be transferred to Florida to face child molestation charges after waiving his extradition hearing. He faces serious allegations, including false imprisonment, mirroring past legal troubles of his brother, Josh Duggar, who was convicted of child sexual abuse.

dailyNews.title: Iranian man, Romanian woman arrested trying to enter UK's Falsane nuclear base amid Israel-US' conflict with Iran
dailyNews.description: The man and the woman are due to appear at Dumbarton Sheriff Court on Monday. It also mentioned that enquiries are currently underway

dailyNews.title: US-Israel, Iran conflict: Pezeshkian calls for forming ‘Islamic Assembly of the Middle East,' seeks help from neighbors
dailyNews.description: Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian on Saturday called for the establishment of an Islamic Assembly of the Middle East, to ensure regional stability and peace. In a statement, he sought to mend ties with Arab neighbours amid the ongoing conflict

dailyNews.title: FBI raids Hollywood mansion in $17.4M alleged mortgage scam targeting seniors, 11 arrested including Iranian
dailyNews.description: FBI agents raided a Hollywood mansion early Thursday, arresting a suspect in pajamas in a raid tied to an alleged $17.4 million mortgage fraud scheme targeting elderly homeowners.

dailyNews.title: UCLA's Skyy Clark loses front tooth in March Madness thriller to help Bruins seal first-round victory
dailyNews.description: UCLA's Skyy Clark lost half a front tooth in the NCAA tournament but returned to hit a key free throw, helping the Bruins defeat UCF 75-71 on Friday.

dailyNews.title: Coldplay Kiss Cam exec accuses Gwyneth Paltrow and Ryan Reynolds of fueling scandal with viral ad
dailyNews.description: HR executive Kristin Cabot slams Gwyneth Paltrow and Ryan Reynolds for mocking her Coldplay Kiss Cam scandal in commercial, calling it hypocritical.

dailyNews.title: Afroman 'surprised' by reaction to his major free speech victory after jury verdict
dailyNews.description: Afroman said he was surprised by the reaction to his First Amendment case after an Ohio jury sided with him over songs mocking a 2022 police raid on his home.

dailyNews.title: Maher was amused by Trump’s Pearl Harbor joke to Japanese leader, says ‘if Shane Gillis said it, you’d laugh’
dailyNews.description: Bill Maher defended Trump's Pearl Harbor joke to Japan's PM Takaichi, saying it wasn't appropriate but was funny, while criticizing the president's handling of Iran conflict.

dailyNews.title: Denise Richards debuts ‘shocking’ facelift transformation in before-and-after photos
dailyNews.description: Denise Richards reveals details of her facelift, including her daughters' pushback, divorce recovery and placing full trust in Dr. Ben Talei.

topStories.description: The 2025 NBA champion Oklahoma City Thunder won't visit the White House, citing timing issues after talks with the administration did not work out.

topStories.title: High Gas Prices, Driven Up by the Iran War, Loom Over the Midterms
topStories.description: The war has complicated the Republican message on affordability. Democrats see an opportunity to drive their economic message while tying President Trump to an unpopular overseas conflict.

dailyNews.title: In Trump’s Administration, Military Housing Is Becoming a Hot Commodity
dailyNews.description: Until President Trump took office for the second time, it was rare for civilian government officials to live on military bases or installations.

dailyNews.title: Fidel Castro’s Grandson Flaunts Beer, Nikes and Trump Jokes on Instagram
dailyNews.description: Sandro Castro has drawn scrutiny for his Instagram posts in which he flaunts a life of luxury while using satire to point out the very deterioration his family’s leadership helped create.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s Ballroom Architect Is Skilled at Shrugging Off Outrage
dailyNews.description: Shalom Baranes, who arrived in the U.S. as a Libyan refugee and went on to renovate the Pentagon, is baffling fellow architects for accepting the job. But he said some of his previous projects have drawn outrage too.

dailyNews.title: One Year After Trump’s $400 Million Ultimatum, a Different Columbia
dailyNews.description: As they sought to respond to charges of antisemitism and harassment on campus, administrators and trustees made promises. Many have been kept, but not all.

dailyNews.title: Trump Is Hiding the Truth About the War in Iran
dailyNews.description: Whatever short-term gain the president thinks he is getting by lying about the war in Iran is far exceeded by the cost, for him, the country and the world.

dailyNews.title: Trump threatens to use ICE for airport security amid worsening delays
dailyNews.description: Wait times aren't expected to improve until government funding is restored and TSA officers receive paychecks.

dailyNews.title: Analysis: Trump's unshackled presidency puts him at the center of the economy
dailyNews.description: The president's unprecedented use of executive power has made him a driving force behind oil prices, the Federal Reserve's interest rates and more.

dailyNews.title: Opinion: As Trump eyes Cuba, my trips there a decade ago remind me how different things were
dailyNews.description: Trump has threatened a 'friendly takeover' of Cuba after cutting it off from Venezuela's oil. CNBC's Justin Solomon reflects how different things used to be.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.

dailyNews.title: Beijing Signals Readiness to Talk to Trump's Team, Even Old Foes
dailyNews.description: The Chinese foreign minister spoke by phone with Marco Rubio, the new secretary of state who has been a critic of Beijing.

dailyNews.title: Canada Is Becoming a Fentanyl Exporter, and a Target for Trump
dailyNews.description: The drug is increasingly manufactured in and trafficked from the U.S.’s northern neighbor, though the numbers remain small compared with Mexico.
